name: Penne All'arrabbiata (Penne with Spicy Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Italian tomatoes, canned - peeled, crushed by hand
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet and sauté the onion until transparent.
2. Add the garlic and sauté until soft.
3. Add the pancetta and cook until bubbling and transparent.
4. Add the capers, mushrooms, olives, hot red pepper, anchovies, salt (use only a pinch because of the anchovies), pepper, and wine.
5. Simmer until the wine is reduced by half.
6. Add the tomatoes and simmer for 10 minutes longer.
7. Add the basil leaves.
8. Toss in the pasta and sprinkle generously with cheese and parsley.
9. Serve immediately.
